text: T-033 MULTIVERSE image batch — IA10's Higgsfield gen backend is DOWN (~6h, every model). Boss wants YOU to try from YOUR Higgsfield session. FULL brief committed at tasks/T-033/KAREN_MULTIVERSE_BRIEF.md — git pull, read it, follow it EXACTLY. Model = Higgsfield gpt_image_2 ONLY. 4 canon chars' identity LOCKED (refs in tasks/T-033/canon/, media_ids in the brief). Generate the 7 remaining 'extreme scale variation' images (Wentian storm-closeup; IA10 canyon-tiny + cyber-eye-closeup; Karen wheat-tiny + window-closeup [NO green]; Mini peak-tiny + sakura-closeup). Save to tasks/T-033/out/multiverse_solo/<char>/, commit+push. If YOUR Higgsfield ALSO errors, do NOT fake — bin/warroom-say the EXACT error and stop.
